canonical_invariant: If no valid object exists -> nothing happens.
scope: Repository-local enumeration only; this artifact does not deploy, merge, or mutate production.

surfaces.authority_model: explicit workflow_dispatch inputs bound to worker validation
exact_object_controls: validated_object_hash input must equal compile output
execute request must use validated_object_hash and invocation_nonce accepted by /validate
proof request must bind execution_id, decision_id, validated_object_hash, workflow, run_id, and commit_sha
replay_controls: replay execute probe must return NULL/INVALID
authority consumed only after proof persistence
bypass_implications: manual dispatch remains possible but must fail closed without valid object inputs
no direct wrangler deploy command observed in workflow

exact_object_controls: outputs must be treated as proposal artifacts until validation/execution
must not collapse proposal into execution
replay_controls: generated invocation_nonce must be single-use downstream
proof_controls: no production proof expected because this workflow must not execute
bypass_implications: manual prepare-to-deploy handoff is execution-adjacent and must remain non-executing

exact_object_controls: changed_files and governed_files must bind to current PR head SHA
replay_controls: candidate objects bind to PR number and head_sha
proof_controls: artifact upload only; no production proof
bypass_implications: can hide future bypass if governed path patterns are incomplete

exact_object_controls: PREO candidate must bind to PR head_sha
replay_controls: candidate identity includes PR number and head_sha
proof_controls: artifact upload only; no production proof
bypass_implications: review-only surface; not sufficient for execution authority

exact_object_controls: SCO candidate must bind changed/governed files to PR head_sha
replay_controls: candidate identity includes PR number and head_sha
proof_controls: artifact upload only; no production proof
bypass_implications: classification gaps may leave governed mutations unmarked

exact_object_controls: canonicalized AEO hash persisted before validation
execute requires matching VALID validation row
proof lineage must equal execution lineage
proof_controls: authority consumption conditioned on proof row existence
bypass_implications: all raw D1 writes must stay inside canonical route handlers or lifecycle revocation helpers

exact_object_controls: registry schema must preserve validated_object_hash, execution_id, proof_id, lineage fields
replay_controls: unique constraints for invocation/proof replay prevention must not be weakened
proof_controls: proof_registry and archive schema must remain proof-capable
bypass_implications: wrangler d1 migrations apply against production would be a raw DB mutation bypass unless governed separately

required_route: local only unless promoted through governed deploy
exact_object_controls: deploy script must remain disabled or route to governed workflow
replay_controls: none for local dev; production must not rely on npm deploy
bypass_implications: npm run deploy must not become a direct deploy path

surfaces.target: Cloudflare Worker and D1 production binding metadata
exact_object_controls: main must remain canonical runtime entrypoint src/index.ts
replay_controls: configuration changes must not introduce alternate execution identity
proof_controls: production deploy proof must identify workflow and commit_sha
bypass_implications: changing main/database binding can redirect execution outside canonical runtime

surfaces.path: server.js, gateway.js, worker.js, registry.js, compile-decision.js, Dockerfile, mindshift_bundle_generator.sh
exact_object_controls: must not be accepted as production execution proof
replay_controls: demo static objects must not be reusable as authority
proof_controls: no production proof accepted from these paths
bypass_implications: Dockerfile points at disabled server.js; registry.js and compile-decision.js remain hidden demo execution paths if invoked manually

required_route: must be recompiled/validated through runtime before any execution
exact_object_controls: static object must not bypass compile/validate
replay_controls: static demo decision_id/signature are not production replay authority
proof_controls: no proof implication unless converted to canonical runtime object
bypass_implications: webhook mutation path exists as demo data and must remain non-operative
